title: ComfyUI Tutorial Series Ep 39: Using WAN 2.1 with LoRAs for Wild Effects! (Squish, Crush & More)
description:
Unlock mind-blowing animation effects in ComfyUI with WAN 2.1 and LoRAs! In this episode, learn how to create viral effects like squish, inflate, crush, rotate, and more using simple workflows. All workflows are free to download from Discord, and I’ll guide you step by step on how to install, set up, and run them smoothly.

🔥 What You’ll Learn in This Episode:
✅ How to set up WAN 2.1 with LoRAs for unique animation effects
✅ Where to download LoRAs and trigger words for better results
✅ How to generate 4-5 second animation clips with optimized settings
✅ Running ComfyUI in the cloud for those without a powerful GPU

Each effect is controlled by a different LoRA, and I’ve included workflows for each one to make it easy to swap and experiment. Whether you want to squish a bunny, inflate objects like a balloon, crush things with a hydraulic press, or turn everything into cake, this tutorial has you covered!

🔗 Get all workflows fpr free from the "pixaroma workflows" channel on Discord!
